title: BuildingDataPoint
description: Represents a building automation data point — a sensor, setpoint, or actuator in a Siemens building management system.

id.description: Unique identifier of the building data point

name.description: Human-readable name of the data point

description.description: Description of what the data point measures or controls

unit.description: Engineering unit for the measurement (e.g., degC, Pa, m3/h, %)

writable.description: Whether this point accepts write commands from the API

equipmentId.description: Identifier of the equipment this point belongs to
